issues.description: TrashFromHand is incorrect. The card effect states 'trash this Character' (the card itself on board), not from hand. Should be a self-trash action or condition, not TrashFromHand.
KO target missing 'rested' condition filter. Effect specifies 'rested Characters' but target only filters by maxCost. Must add rested state requirement.

Activation cost/condition missing. '[Activate: Main]' with 'You may trash this Character' indicates conditional activation—should structure as optional self-trash triggering the KO, or add explicit cost condition.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Activate: Main] You may trash this Character: K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's rested Characters with a cost of 2 or less.
